entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; domain tag for this knowledge

entities.name: Geometric Distance
entities.context: Framework measuring career pivot difficulty based on distance from existing domain and role expertise

entities.name: Degrees of Freedom
entities.context: Framework for viewing career strategy as variables (role and domain) that can be changed independently

entities.name: Sequential Pivots
entities.context: Strategy of changing role OR domain one at a time, rather than simultaneously

entities.name: Diagonal Jumps
entities.context: Anti-pattern of changing both role and domain simultaneously; market cannot price these

entities.name: Pattern Matching
entities.context: Mechanism by which markets validate candidates through risk mitigation

entities.name: Information Asymmetry
entities.context: Risk factor that increases when candidates attempt multi-variable pivots

relationships.context: Degrees of Freedom provides the calculation framework for Geometric Distance
Sequential Pivots is the recommended alternative to Diagonal Jumps
Diagonal jumps increase information asymmetry and perceived risk
Core framework applied in Careerspan career coaching methodology
Recommended strategy for career coaching at Careerspan
Market pattern matching explains why geometric distance affects hiring/funding outcomes
